channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police deploy continuous security outside Abhijeet Dipke’s residence amid online attention to emerging political group
item.description: Police in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra, have deployed round-the-clock security outside the residence of Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the newly emerging and socially viral “Cockroach Janata Par...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure second CAF Champions League title after draw in Rabat
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have been crowned CAF Champions League winners for the second time in their history after holding AS FAR Rabat to a tense 1-1 draw in the second leg of the final at the Prince Moulay...

item.title: Insurer disburses over N7 billion in claims to policyholders in 2025
item.description: In 2025, an insurance company (emPLE General Insurance Limited) reported that it has paid out over N7 billion in claims to Nigerians who experienced various forms of losses. The development highlights...

item.title: Trump signals cautious progress in US–Iran negotiations over nuclear deal and regional tensions
item.description: The article reports on ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran regarding a potential agreement aimed at de-escalating tensions and addressing nuclear concerns. According to regional of...

item.title: Rep. Thomas Massie warns GOP policies could hurt Republican performance in upcoming midterm elections
item.description: Outgoing Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) delivered a stark warning about the future of the Republican Party during a recent appearance on NBC’s “Meet the Press.” Speaking with host Kristen Welker, Massie re...

item.title: US Secretary Marco Rubio and NSA Ajit Doval hold talks on strengthening India-US defence and technology partnership
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who also serves as the US National Security Advisor, met India’s National Security Advisor Ajit Doval in New Delhi on Sunday for high-level discussions aimed at deep...

item.title: New Zealand’s braided rivers face pressure from human control and environmental change
item.description: This podcast episode of the Guardian’s Full Story explores the environmental and cultural significance of New Zealand’s braided rivers and the growing tensions around how they should be managed. Braid...

item.title: Tundu Lissu faces renewed court proceedings in Chadema party resources case
item.description: Tanzanian opposition leader Tundu Lissu has returned to court in relation to a case involving the management and use of resources within the opposition party Chadema. The matter adds another layer to ...

item.title: Bystander seriously injured after gunman opened fire near White House checkpoint
item.description: A bystander injured during a shooting near the White House remained in a serious but stable condition on Sunday, according to the US Secret Service. The individual, whose identity has not been disclos...

item.title: Oscar Piastri receives 10-second penalty after collision with Alex Albon in Formula One race
item.description: Australian Formula One driver Oscar Piastri was handed a 10-second time penalty following a collision involving Alex Albon during a race weekend incident. The decision by race stewards came after offi...

item.title: Chinese firm signals $2bn industrial investment interest in Jigawa State
item.description: Jigawa State has attracted significant foreign investment interest as a Chinese company, Hefei Shengwen Information Technology Company Limited, expressed plans to invest about $2 billion in industrial...

item.title: Pep Guardiola bids farewell to Manchester City after a decade of success
item.description: Pep Guardiola has bid an emotional farewell to Manchester City after a decade in charge, as fans at the Etihad Stadium paid tribute to the manager who reshaped the club and left a lasting mark on Engl...

item.title: Centre releases draft rules for implementation of VB-G RAM G rural employment scheme from July 1
item.description: The Union government has released draft rules for implementing the Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025, also known as VB-G RAM G, which will replace the existi...

item.title: Conti criticizes Cayetano’s remarks defending Duterte-era drug war
item.description: A news report published by ABS-CBN News on May 24, 2026 focused on criticism directed at Senator Alan Peter Cayetano over his defense of the Duterte administration’s controversial anti-drug campaign. ...

item.title: Concerns Raised After Environment and Climate Change Canada Disbands Radar Research Team Amid Shift to AI Forecasting
item.description: Weather specialists and industry observers are raising concerns about public safety following the decision by Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) to disband its radar research team. Weather r...

item.title: China launches Shenzhou-23 crew mission as part of long-term Moon exploration plans
item.description: China successfully launched the Shenzhou-23 mission carrying three astronauts to the Tiangong space station as part of the country’s expanding space programme and preparations for future lunar explora...

item.title: Hasan Hadi’s ‘The President’s Cake’ portrays the hardship of Iraqi children under Saddam Hussein’s regime
item.description: Scroll.in reviews Iraqi director Hasan Hadi’s award-winning film ‘The President’s Cake’, a moving drama set in Iraq during the early 1990s under Saddam Hussein’s rule. The story follows nine-year-old ...

item.title: Arizona Brandy opens up about difficult family acceptance on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: Arizona Brandy shared an emotional and personal experience regarding her journey toward acceptance within her family during her appearance on the television program Kapamilya Deal or No Deal. In the s...

item.title: Serious vehicle rollover near Winnipeg school sends driver to hospital by air
item.description: A driver was airlifted to hospital following a serious single-vehicle rollover near Murdoch MacKay Collegiate in Winnipeg. Emergency responders were called to the scene after reports of a vehicle over...

item.title: ADC urges unity and discipline ahead of presidential primary election
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has called on its presidential aspirants, party leaders, delegates and members across Nigeria to show unity, discipline and commitment to democratic values as the...
